page.title: Teen Birthday Yacht Charter in Marbella

data.meta_description: Plan an unforgettable teen birthday yacht charter in Marbella. From €749/2h with skipper, drinks & snacks included. Book your party today.
data.summary: Celebrate a teen birthday in style with a private yacht charter from Puerto Banús. Our fleet includes boats for up to 12 guests, with all-inclusive pricing from €749 for 2 hours.
key_facts: Prices from €749 for 2 hours (Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39) up to €4,719 for 4 hours (Mangusta 80).
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% VAT.
Depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella – the heart of the Costa del Sol.
Maximum capacity: 12 guests on most boats (e.g., Mangusta 80, Azimut 58 Flybridge).
Free jet ski included on Mangusta 80 bookings (4+ hours).
No hidden fees – everything is transparent and upfront.
Suitable for ages 12+; parental consent required for under-18s.

faq.q: What is the minimum age for a teen birthday yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: There is no strict minimum age, but we recommend 12+ for safety and enjoyment. All guests under 18 must have parental or guardian consent. The skipper will brief everyone on safety rules before departure.

faq.q: How many guests can we bring on a teen birthday yacht?
faq.a: Our boats accommodate from 5 to 12 guests. For a teen party, popular options include the Astondoa 40 (9 pax) or Azimut 39 (11 pax). For larger groups, the Mangusta 80 holds up to 12 guests. Check the fleet page for exact capacities.

faq.q: What is included in the teen birthday yacht charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden extras – just bring your party spirit.

faq.q: Can we bring our own food and decorations for the birthday?
faq.a: Absolutely. You are welcome to bring a birthday cake, snacks, and decorations. Just let us know in advance so we can assist with storage and setup. The skipper will ensure everything stays safe and tidy on board.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad on the day of our charter?
faq.a: Marbella enjoys 300+ sunny days a year, but if conditions are unsafe, we will reschedule or offer a full refund. Our team monitors forecasts closely and will contact you 24 hours before departure if changes are needed.

faq.q: Can we play music on the yacht during the party?
faq.a: Yes, all our yachts have Bluetooth or AUX sound systems. You can connect your phone and play your own playlist. Keep volume at a reasonable level out of respect for other boaters and marine life.

faq.q: Do we need to bring anything for the teen birthday yacht charter?
faq.a: Just swimwear, towels, sunscreen, and a camera. We provide all drinks and snacks. If you want specific food or a birthday cake, bring it along. The yacht is fully equipped with a fridge and ice.

faq.q: How do we book a teen birthday yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp on our website. We will confirm availability, choose the right boat for your group size and budget, and handle all arrangements. Payment is secure and straightforward.

data.body_html:
Planning a teen birthday in Marbella? A private yacht charter from Puerto Banús is the ultimate way to celebrate. With all-inclusive pricing from €749 for 2 hours, your group can enjoy the Mediterranean in style – no hidden costs, just sun, sea, and memories. Our fleet includes boats for up to 12 guests, with licensed skippers, drinks, and snacks included. Read on for everything you need to know.

Why Choose a Teen Birthday Yacht Charter in Marbella?

Marbella is famous for its glamorous coastline, and a yacht charter offers a unique party venue away from crowded beaches. Teens love the freedom of swimming in crystal-clear coves like Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés, and the thrill of spotting dolphins along the coast. With a private skipper handling navigation, parents can relax while the birthday crew enjoys music, snacks, and the open sea. Plus, Puerto Banús is a world-class marina with easy access to the best spots along the Costa del Sol.

Our Fleet for Teen Birthday Parties

We have a range of boats suitable for teen groups. For smaller parties (up to 9 guests), the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, €749/2h) or Azimut 39 (12.5m, €749/2h) are ideal. For larger groups (up to 12 guests), the Mangusta 80 (24m, from €4,719 for 4 hours) includes a free jet ski – a guaranteed hit with teens. All boats depart from Puerto Banús and come with a full crew, drinks, and snacks. Check our [full fleet](/fleet/) for more options.

What's Included in the Price?

Every charter includes: a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No extra charges for cleaning or dock fees. For the Mangusta 80, a jet ski is included free for 4+ hour bookings. You can bring your own birthday cake and decorations – just let us know in advance.

Popular Itineraries for Teen Birthday Charters

Most charters head west towards Estepona or east towards Cabopino. A 2-hour trip is perfect for a quick spin past the Golden Mile and a swim stop. A 4-hour charter lets you reach Cala del Faro for cliff jumping or anchor off Sotogrande for a longer swim. The skipper will tailor the route to your group's preferences. All boats are equipped with Bluetooth speakers, so you can play your own playlist.

Safety and Supervision

Your safety is our priority. All skippers are licensed and experienced. Life jackets are provided for all guests, and the crew will give a safety briefing before departure. Teen groups must have at least one responsible adult (18+) present. We recommend guests be aged 12+ for the best experience. The yacht is a safe environment, but the skipper has the final say on all activities.

How to Book a Teen Birthday Yacht Charter in Marbella

Booking is easy. Contact us via WhatsApp on our website. Tell us your preferred date, group size, and any special requests (like a birthday cake or specific music). We will confirm availability and send you a quote. Payment is secure, and we offer free rescheduling if plans change. For more inspiration, read our [Marbella yacht charter guide](/).

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the minimum age for a teen birthday yacht charter in Marbella?

There is no strict minimum age, but we recommend 12+ for safety and enjoyment. All guests under 18 must have parental or guardian consent. The skipper will brief everyone on safety rules before departure.

How many guests can we bring on a teen birthday yacht?

Our boats accommodate from 5 to 12 guests. For a teen party, popular options include the Astondoa 40 (9 pax) or Azimut 39 (11 pax). For larger groups, the Mangusta 80 holds up to 12 guests. Check the fleet page for exact capacities.

What is included in the teen birthday yacht charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden extras – just bring your party spirit.

Can we bring our own food and decorations for the birthday?

Absolutely. You are welcome to bring a birthday cake, snacks, and decorations. Just let us know in advance so we can assist with storage and setup. The skipper will ensure everything stays safe and tidy on board.

What happens if the weather is bad on the day of our charter?

Marbella enjoys 300+ sunny days a year, but if conditions are unsafe, we will reschedule or offer a full refund. Our team monitors forecasts closely and will contact you 24 hours before departure if changes are needed.

Can we play music on the yacht during the party?

Yes, all our yachts have Bluetooth or AUX sound systems. You can connect your phone and play your own playlist. Keep volume at a reasonable level out of respect for other boaters and marine life.

Do we need to bring anything for the teen birthday yacht charter?

Just swimwear, towels, sunscreen, and a camera. We provide all drinks and snacks. If you want specific food or a birthday cake, bring it along. The yacht is fully equipped with a fridge and ice.

How do we book a teen birthday yacht charter in Marbella?

Contact us via WhatsApp on our website. We will confirm availability, choose the right boat for your group size and budget, and handle all arrangements. Payment is secure and straightforward.
